title: Effect of homologation
doc_html:
Art. 3337.  Effect of homologation

A judgment homologating any account other than a final account shall be prima facie evidence of the correctness of the account.

A judgment homologating a final account has the same effect as a final judgment in an ordinary action.
doc_text:
Art. 3337.  Effect of homologation
A judgment homologating any account other than a final account shall be prima facie evidence of the correctness of the account.
A judgment homologating a final account has the same effect as a final judgment in an ordinary action.
